name: Ata Kids Shuttle
registry_source: California Secretary of State (bizfileonline.sos.ca.gov) - not retrievable via WebFetch (no JS)
notes: no USDOT (likely intrastate). SAFER name searches for 'ATA KIDS' and 'KIDS SHUTTLE' returned no records. No corporate registry hit via open searches. Web hits found nearby competitor 'A to B Kid Shuttle' (atobkidshuttle.com) but that is a distinct entity. Address 12000 Lauren St, Woodland Hills CA 91364 is residential — consistent with a small intrastate school/private ride service. California intrastate passenger carriers are typically regulated under CPUC (TCP permit) and CHP SPAB, not FMCSA.
